chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: China Launches Shenzhou-23 Spacecraft with 3 Astronauts
chunks.text: China successfully launched the Shenzhou-23 spacecraft to its Tiangong Space Station with three astronauts on board. The crew, led by Ye Guangfu, includes Lai Kanying, the first female astronaut from the Hong Kong region to travel to space. They will replace the Shenzhou-21 crew. One of the astronauts plans to stay at the station for a full year to set a record for the longest continuous human stay in space, aiming to test human endurance limits for China's upcoming 2030 lunar mission.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: China Launches Shenzhou-23 Spacecraft with 3 Astronauts
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Static Hook: Tiangong means "Heavenly Palace". China built its own space station after being excluded from the International Space Station (ISS) by the USA. GEM Exam Angle: Match the spacecraft to the country (Shenzhou -> China). Note that Lai Kanying is the first female astronaut from Hong Kong. Diplomacy · Bilateral MODERATE

chunks.section: FM Sitharaman Cautions on Fuel, Forex Amidst Middle East Tensions
chunks.text: Addressing the 37th anniversary of SIDBI, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman highlighted that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East has disrupted global crude oil supplies, leading to a multi-fold increase in petrol, diesel, and fertilizer prices. She urged caution regarding fuel and foreign exchange (forex) management. She defended the PM's appeal to avoid foreign travel to save forex and noted that cutting excise duty on fuel cost the Centre ₹1 lakh crore.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Mekedatu Dam: CM Joseph Vijay Writes to PM; SC Hearing on 69% Reservation
chunks.text: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Joseph Vijay has written a strongly worded letter to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, urging the Centre to reject Karnataka's Detailed Project Report (DPR) for the Mekedatu balancing reservoir project. He pointed out that the project violates the SC's 2018 final verdict and is an attempt by Karnataka to block uncontrolled water flow from its catchments. Concurrently, the CM chaired a high-level meeting regarding the Supreme Court's upcoming hearing on May 27 challenging Tamil Nadu's 69% reservation policy.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Mekedatu Dam: CM Joseph Vijay Writes to PM; SC Hearing on 69% Reservation
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Article (Water): Article 262 deals with the adjudication of disputes relating to waters of inter-state rivers or river valleys. Constitutional Article (Reservation): The 69% reservation of Tamil Nadu is protected under the 9th Schedule of the Constitution, placed there by the 76th Constitutional Amendment Act, 1994, to protect it from judicial review (though later judgements opened it to basic structure tests). GEM Exam Angle: Questions on Mekedatu will likely test geography (confluence of Cauvery and Arkavathi

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: UPSC Clears 3 Names for Full-Time TN DGP Post
chunks.text: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has cleared a panel of three senior IPS officers for the post of full-time Director General of Police (DGP) and Head of Police Force (HoPF) of Tamil Nadu. The three officers in order of seniority are Rajeev Kumar, Sandeep Rathore (currently holding the post), and Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal. The Tamil Nadu government will now officially select one of these three as the next full-time DGP. தமிழ்நாட்டின் முழு நேர சட்டம்-ஒழுங்கு டிஜிபி (DGP) மற்றும் காவல் படைத் தலைவர் (HoPF) பதவிக்கான மூன்று மூத்த ஐபிஎஸ் அதிகார

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: India-US Sign Critical Minerals Supply Chain Agreement
chunks.text: India and the United States have signed a landmark agreement to strengthen the global supply chain of critical minerals, effectively countering China's global monopoly. The agreement, signed in New Delhi by EAM S. Jaishankar and US Secretary of State Marco Rubio, focuses on ensuring reliable supply chains for strategic metals needed for EVs, drones, and modern technology. India's recent joining of the US-led 'Minerals Security Partnership' laid the foundation for this bilateral pact.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: India-US Sign Critical Minerals Supply Chain Agreement
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Static GK Hook: Critical minerals include Lithium, Cobalt, Nickel, and Rare Earth Elements (REEs), essential for green energy transition. China currently processes over 60% of the world's critical minerals. TRAP Do not confuse this bilateral pact with the Quad meeting occurring simultaneously. Though signed during the Quad summit sidelines, this is an India-US bilateral agreement. GEM Exam Angle: Note the term "Minerals Security Partnership" (MSP).

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Centre Forms High-Level Committee to Study Demographic Changes
chunks.text: The Union Home Ministry, led by Amit Shah, has constituted a High-Level Committee headed by retired Supreme Court Judge Prakash Prabhakar Naolekar to study demographic changes caused by illegal immigration and unnatural practices. The committee includes members like the Census Commissioner, retired IPS/IAS officers, and will investigate the socio-economic and border security challenges posed by population shifts. The committee will submit its report within six months.

chunks.section: US Launches Strikes on Southern Iran Amidst Ceasefire Talks
chunks.text: The US military launched fresh strikes on missile launch sites and mine-laying boats in southern Iran, near the strategic Strait of Hormuz. The US Central Command (CENTCOM) described it as an act of "self-defense" against Iranian forces. Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) condemned the action as a severe violation of the temporary ceasefire that has been in place since April 8. Four IRGC personnel were reportedly killed. முக்கியத்துவம் வாய்ந்த ஹோர்முஸ் ஜலசந்திக்கு அருகிலுள்ள தெற்கு ஈரானில் உள்ள ஏவுகணை ஏவுதளங்கள் மற்றும் கண்ணிவெடிகளைப் பொரு

chunks.section: Senegal: Ousted PM Ousmane Sonko Elected Parliament Speaker
chunks.text: In West Africa's Senegal, recently ousted Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko has been elected as the Speaker of the Parliament. Sonko, whose government was dissolved last week by President Bassirou Diomaye Faye due to policy differences over IMF debt agreements, now holds significant legislative power to challenge the President's upcoming new cabinet. மேற்கு ஆப்பிரிக்க நாடான செனகலில், சமீபத்தில் பதவியிலிருந்து நீக்கப்பட்ட பிரதமர் உஸ்மான் சோன்கோ நாடாளுமன்ற சபாநாயகராக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ளார்.

chunks.section: Taiwan Overtakes India to Become 5th Largest Stock Market Globally
chunks.text: Driven by the Artificial Intelligence (AI) boom, Taiwan has overtaken India to become the world's 5th largest stock market by capitalization. According to Bloomberg data, Taiwan's total market cap surged to $4. 95 trillion, largely fueled by a 49% rally in TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co) shares this year. Conversely, India's market cap slipped to $4. 92 trillion due to geopolitical tensions and foreign fund outflows. செயற்கை நுண்ணறிவு (AI) தொழில்நுட்பத்தின் அபரிமிதமான வளர்ச்சியால், பங்குச்சந்தை மூலதன மதிப்பில் இந்தியாவை முந்தி தைவா

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Taiwan Overtakes India to Become 5th Largest Stock Market Globally
chunks.text: TRAP Although Taiwan beat India in *stock market cap*, India's overall GDP ($4. 15 Trillion) is massively larger than Taiwan's GDP ($977 Billion). Do not confuse market cap with GDP.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: CM Joseph Vijay Meets PM Modi; Discusses Mekedatu, Funds & Fishermen Issue
chunks.text: In his first official visit to New Delhi since taking office, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Joseph Vijay met Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Key demands placed before the PM included: rejecting Karnataka's Detailed Project Report (DPR) for the Mekedatu dam project, releasing arrested Tamil Nadu fishermen (58 currently in custody with 266 boats seized), and seeking Central funds for key infrastructure projects like Metro rails in Hosur, Coimbatore, and Madurai.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: CM Joseph Vijay Meets PM Modi; Discusses Mekedatu, Funds & Fishermen Issue
chunks.text: The CM also met Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman. பதவியேற்ற பிறகு முதல்முறையாக புதுதில்லி சென்ற தமிழக முதல்வர் ஜோசப் விஜய், பிரதமர் நரேந்திர மோடியை சந்தித்தார். கர்நாடகாவின் மேகதாது அணை திட்டத்திற்கான விரிவான திட்ட அறிக்கையை (DPR) நிராகரிப்பது, கைது செய்யப்பட்ட தமிழக மீனவர்களை விடுவிப்பது (தற்போது 58 பேர் காவலில், 266 படகுகள் பறிமுதல்), ஒசூர், கோவை, மதுரையில் மெட்ரோ ரயில் திட்டங்களுக்கு நிதி கோருவது உள்ளிட்ட முக்கிய கோரிக்கைகளை பிரதமரிடம் அவர் முன்வைத்தார்.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: CM Joseph Vijay Meets PM Modi; Discusses Mekedatu, Funds & Fishermen Issue
chunks.text: மேலும், மத்திய நிதியமைச்சர் நிர்மலா சீதாராமனையும் முதல்வர் சந்தித்தார். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Polity Hook: Article 262 deals with the adjudication of inter-state river water disputes. The Cauvery Water Disputes Tribunal and Supreme Court's 2018 ruling are central to the Mekedatu issue. GEM Defence & Infrastructure Angle: The CM also proposed establishing an Advanced Medium Combat Aircraft (AMCA) design and development centre and an aerospace park in Tamil Nadu.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: SC Upholds Ban on Online Rummy & Poker in Tamil Nadu and Karnataka
chunks.text: The Supreme Court upheld the laws passed by the Tamil Nadu and Karnataka state governments that ban online games involving betting and wagering, specifically online rummy and poker. Overturning the earlier High Court rulings (which had struck down the bans), a bench comprising Justices J. Pardiwala and R. Mahadevan ruled that states have the constitutional authority to regulate or prohibit online gambling that adversely affects public interest, even if the games involve a degree of skill.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: SC Upholds Ban on Online Rummy & Poker in Tamil Nadu and Karnataka
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Link: "Betting and Gambling" falls under Entry 34 of the State List (List II) in the Seventh Schedule of the Constitution. Therefore, state legislatures have exclusive power to make laws on it. PYQ TNPSC has repeatedly asked to match subjects with their respective Constitutional Lists (Union, State, Concurrent). Judiciary · Environment MODERATE

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Madras HC Bans Cow Slaughter in Public Places for Bakrid
chunks.text: The Madras High Court has issued an order prohibiting the slaughter of cows and other cattle in public places across Tamil Nadu for the Bakrid festival. Hearing a PIL filed by Hindu Makkal Katchi against unauthorized slaughtering in Coimbatore, the bench directed that animal sacrifices must only occur in authorized slaughterhouses, ensuring it doesn't hurt religious sentiments or violate public sanitation norms. பக்ரீத் பண்டிகைக்காக தமிழகம் முழுவதும் பொது இடங்களில் மாடுகள் மற்றும் பிற கால்நடைகளை வெட்ட சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்றம் தடை விதித்துள்ளது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Madras HC Bans Cow Slaughter in Public Places for Bakrid
chunks.text: கோவையில் அங்கீகரிக்கப்படாத இடங்களில் வெட்டப்படுவதை எதிர்த்து இந்து மக்கள் கட்சி தாக்கல் செய்த பொதுநல வழக்கை விசாரித்த அமர்வு, மத உணர்வுகளைப் புண்படுத்தாமலும், பொது சுகாதார விதிமுறைகளை மீறாமலும், அங்கீகரிக்கப்பட்ட இறைச்சிக் கூடங்களில் மட்டுமே விலங்குகளை பலியிட வேண்டும் என்று உத்தரவிட்டது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment TRAP DPSP Link: Article 48 of the Constitution directs the State to take steps for preserving and improving the breeds, and prohibiting the slaughter of cows and calves and other milch and draught cattle.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: SC Empowers EC for Special Summary Revision (SSR) of Electoral Rolls
chunks.text: The Supreme Court affirmed that the Election Commission (EC) holds the authority to conduct the Special Summary Revision (SSR) of electoral rolls. This ruling validated the EC's action in Bihar, where 65 lakh names were deleted from the voter list prior to the 2025 assembly elections due to migration, death, and duplication. Crucially, the apex court noted that an Aadhaar card is an identity document but NOT conclusive proof of citizenship for voting rights.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: SC Empowers EC for Special Summary Revision (SSR) of Electoral Rolls
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Angle: Article 324 vests the superintendence, direction, and control of elections, including the preparation of electoral rolls, in the Election Commission. Statutory Law: The Representation of the People Act, 1950, deals with the preparation and revision of electoral rolls. GEM Exam Angle: Aadhaar vs Citizenship. Note that Aadhaar is strictly for identity (biometric/demographic) and subsidies, not proof of Indian citizenship.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Assam Assembly Passes Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Bill
chunks.text: The Assam state assembly passed the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Bill, becoming the third state in independent India to do so (after Uttarakhand and Gujarat). The bill standardizes laws regarding marriage, divorce, and inheritance across religions. Key provisions include a complete ban on polygamy (punishable by 7 years in jail) and mandatory registration for live-in relationships. The bill uniquely exempts the state's tribal population from its purview.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Assam Assembly Passes Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Bill
chunks.text: உத்தரகாண்ட் மற்றும் குஜராத்துக்குப் பிறகு, சுதந்திர இந்தியாவில் பொது சிவில் சட்ட (UCC) மசோதாவை நிறைவேற்றிய மூன்றாவது மாநிலமாக அசாம் மாறியது. இந்த மசோதா அனைத்து மதங்களிலும் திருமணம், விவாகரத்து மற்றும் வாரிசுரிமை தொடர்பான சட்டங்களை தரப்படுத்துகிறது. பலதார மணத்திற்கு முழுமையான தடை (7 ஆண்டுகள் சிறைத்தண்டனை) மற்றும் சேர்ந்து வாழும் உறவுகளுக்கு கட்டாயப் பதிவு ஆகியவை முக்கிய அம்சங்களாகும். இந்த மசோதா மாநிலத்தின் பழங்குடியினருக்கு விலக்கு அளிக்கிறது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Hook: Article 44 of the Directive Principles of State Policy (DPSP).

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Cabinet Approves Extension of SMART-PDS Scheme for 5 Years
chunks.text: The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs (CCEA), chaired by PM Modi, has approved the extension of the "SMART-PDS" (Scheme for Modernization and Reforms through Technology in Public Distribution System) for another five years with an outlay of ₹25,530 crore. The scheme aims to prevent leakages, ensure ration reaches the targeted beneficiaries, and support states in logistics and tech integration under the National Food Security Act (NFSA). பிரதமர் மோடி தலைமையிலான பொருளாதார விவகாரங்களுக்கான அமைச்சரவைக் குழு (CCEA), பொது விநியோகத் திட்டத்தை தொழி

chunks.section: Cabinet Approves Extension of SMART-PDS Scheme for 5 Years
chunks.text: 25,530 கோடி நிதி ஒதுக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. கசிவுகளைத் தடுப்பது, இலக்கு வைக்கப்பட்ட பயனாளிகளுக்கு ரேஷன் சென்றடைவதை உறுதி செய்வது மற்றும் தேசிய உணவுப் பாதுகாப்புச் சட்டத்தின் (NFSA) கீழ் போக்குவரத்து மற்றும் தொழில்நுட்ப ஒருங்கிணைப்பில் மாநிலங்களுக்கு ஆதரவளிப்பது இத்திட்டத்தின் நோக்கமாகும். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Key Act: The National Food Security Act (NFSA), 2013, aims to provide subsidized food grains to approximately two-thirds of India's population. TIP SMART-PDS is part of the "One Nation One Ration Card" ecosystem driven by technology.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: ₹1,150 Crore Worth Cocaine Seized at Mundra Port in Gujarat
chunks.text: In a massive joint operation by the Gujarat Anti-Terrorist Squad (ATS) and the Coast Guard, cocaine worth ₹1,150 crore was seized from a merchant ship named 'Euro' at the Mundra Port in Kutch district. The ship had arrived from South America via Pakistan. Three foreign nationals (from Tanzania, Nigeria, and Uganda) were arrested in connection with the smuggling ring operating out of Delhi. குஜராத் தீவிரவாத தடுப்புப் படை (ATS) மற்றும் கடலோரக் காவல்படையினர் இணைந்து முந்த்ரா துறைமுகத்தில் (கட்ச் மாவட்டம்) 'யூரோ' என்ற வணிகக் கப்பலில் இருந்து ரூ.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.text: North Korea, overseen by its leader Kim Jong Un, has successfully tested advanced cruise, ballistic, and artillery missiles equipped with Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology. This marks the first time North Korea has officially stated the use of AI in its weapon systems. The AI integration enables the missiles to process real-time data to identify and precisely strike targets up to 100 km away, significantly upgrading their threat posture against South Korea.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Hamas Military Chief Mohammed Deif Killed in Israeli Strike
chunks.text: The Israeli military claimed to have killed Mohammed Deif, the newly appointed military chief of the Hamas organization, in an airstrike in Gaza. Deif, considered a mastermind behind the October 2023 attacks against Israel, was killed along with his family in a market area. The attack occurred during the Islamic festival of Bakrid amidst an already fragile ceasefire brokered by the US. காசாவில் இஸ்ரேல் ராணுவம் நடத்திய வான்வழித் தாக்குதலில், ஹமாஸ் அமைப்பின் புதிய ராணுவ தளபதியான முகமது டெய்ப் கொல்லப்பட்டதாகக் கூறப்படுகிறது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Telecom Subscribers Hit Record High in April; Airtel Leads Additions
chunks.text: According to the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI), India's total telecom subscriber base reached a record 133. 75 crore in April 2026. Bharti Airtel led the market by adding 34. 82 lakh new subscribers (mobile + landline), pushing Reliance Jio (30. 84 lakh additions) to the second spot for the month. However, Jio remains the overall leader in the broadband internet segment with 52. 69 crore subscribers. இந்திய தொலைத்தொடர்பு ஒழுங்குமுறை ஆணையத்தின் (TRAI) தரவுகளின்படி, இந்தியாவின் மொத்த தொலைத்தொடர்பு வாடிக்கையாளர்களின் எண்ணிக்கை ஏப்ரல

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Telecom Subscribers Hit Record High in April; Airtel Leads Additions
chunks.text: 75 கோடியாக புதிய உச்சத்தை எட்டியுள்ளது. பார்தி ஏர்டெல் 34. 82 லட்சம் புதிய வாடிக்கையாளர்களை (மொபைல் + லேண்ட்லைன்) சேர்த்து முதலிடத்தைப் பிடித்தது. ரிலையன்ஸ் ஜியோ (30. 84 லட்சம்) இரண்டாவது இடத்திற்கு தள்ளப்பட்டது. இருப்பினும், 52. 69 கோடி வாடிக்கையாளர்களுடன் பிராட்பேண்ட் இணையப் பிரிவில் ஜியோ தொடர்ந்து முதலிடத்தில் உள்ளது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Regulatory Body: TRAI was established by the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India Act, 1997.

chunks.text: View Answer & Explanation Correct Answer: State List (List II) Context: The Supreme Court recently upheld the laws passed by Tamil Nadu and Karnataka banning online rummy, stating that states have the power to regulate such activities. பின்னணி: ஆன்லைன் ரம்மிக்கு தடை விதித்து தமிழ்நாடு மற்றும் கர்நாடகா நிறைவேற்றிய சட்டங்களை உச்சநீதிமன்றம் சமீபத்தில் உறுதி செய்தது, இத்தகைய செயல்பாடுகளை ஒழுங்குபடுத்துவதற்கு மாநிலங்களுக்கு அதிகாரம் உள்ளது என்று தீர்ப்பளித்தது.

chunks.text: View Answer & Explanation Correct Answer: Article 324 Context: The Supreme Court affirmed the EC's power to conduct Special Summary Revisions (SSR) of electoral rolls, confirming that Aadhaar is not a conclusive proof of citizenship for voting. பின்னணி: வாக்காளர் பட்டியலின் சிறப்பு சுருக்கத் திருத்தங்களை (SSR) மேற்கொள்வதற்கான தேர்தல் ஆணையத்தின் அதிகாரத்தை உச்சநீதிமன்றம் உறுதிப்படுத்தியது, வாக்களிப்பதற்கான குடியுரிமைக்கு ஆதார் ஒரு உறுதியான சான்று அல்ல என்பதை உறுதிப்படுத்தியது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Political Churn: 4 AIADMK MLAs Resign to Support TVK; Former Ministers Jump Ship
chunks.text: In a major political shift following the recent assembly elections where TVK emerged as the single largest party (108 seats), four AIADMK MLAs—Chinnasamy, Maragatham Kumaravel, Jayakumar, and Sathyabama—resigned their posts to join TVK. Additionally, senior AIADMK figures including former minister Vellamandi Natarajan and former DGP R. Nataraj officially joined TVK. Former minister C. Vijayabaskar (Viralimalai MLA) is also consulting his supporters regarding a potential switch to TVK.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Political Churn: 4 AIADMK MLAs Resign to Support TVK; Former Ministers Jump Ship
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Article: The 10th Schedule (Anti-Defection Law) added by the 52nd Amendment Act (1985) deals with the disqualification of MLAs/MPs on grounds of defection. TRAP If an MLA *resigns* their seat before joining another party, the anti-defection law's disqualification (which prevents them from holding ministerial posts) operates differently than if they defected while holding the seat. By resigning, they simply cause a by-election.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Political Churn: 4 AIADMK MLAs Resign to Support TVK; Former Ministers Jump Ship
chunks.text: GEM Article 190(1B) prevents a disqualified defector from being appointed as a Minister until re-elected. Judiciary MODERATE

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: "Judiciary Has Corruption, Judges Aren't Holy": Madras HC Refuses Ban on 'Karuppu' Movie
chunks.text: The Madras High Court dismissed a PIL seeking a ban on actor Suriya's film 'Karuppu', which allegedly depicted the judiciary and judges in a bad light. The bench comprising Justices G. Swaminathan and V. Lakshminarayanan observed, "Nobody can deny there is corruption in the judiciary. Judges need not be considered holy. " The court upheld the filmmaker's artistic freedom (Article 19(1)(a)), stating that a fictional portrayal of a corrupt judge in a fictional court does not amount to Contempt of Court.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: "Judiciary Has Corruption, Judges Aren't Holy": Madras HC Refuses Ban on 'Karuppu' Movie
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Article: Article 19(1)(a) guarantees Freedom of Speech and Expression, which includes artistic and creative freedom, subject to reasonable restrictions under Article 19(2). Legal Framework: Contempt of Courts Act, 1971. High Courts have the power to punish for contempt under Article 215 of the Constitution. Geography · Climate AWARENESS

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: 'Kathiri Veyil' (Agni Natchathiram) Ends in Tamil Nadu
chunks.text: The peak summer period known as 'Kathiri Veyil' or 'Agni Natchathiram', which began on May 4, officially ended on May 28 in Tamil Nadu. On its final day, 16 districts recorded temperatures crossing 100 degrees Fahrenheit, with Chennai (Meenambakkam) recording the highest at 106. The Regional Meteorological Centre predicted isolated heavy rains accompanied by thunder and lightning for several districts in the coming days. மே 4 ஆம் தேதி தொடங்கிய 'கத்திரி வெயில்' அல்லது 'அக்னி நட்சத்திரம்' என்று அழைக்கப்படும் உச்ச கோடைக்காலம் தமிழ்நாட்டில் மே 28 அ

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Karnataka: Siddaramaiah Resigns; D.K. Shivakumar to Take Oath as CM on May 31
chunks.text: Following the Congress High Command's power-sharing formula of two-and-a-half years each, Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah submitted his resignation to Governor Thawar Chand Gehlot on May 28. Shivakumar is set to take over as the new Chief Minister and will take the oath of office on May 31. Siddaramaiah, who served his second term from 2023 to 2026, holds the record for serving as Karnataka's CM for the maximum period of 8 years in recent history.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Karnataka: Siddaramaiah Resigns; D.K. Shivakumar to Take Oath as CM on May 31
chunks.text: காங்கிரஸ் மேலிடத்தின் அதிகாரப் பகிர்வு ஒப்பந்தத்தின்படி (தலா இரண்டரை ஆண்டுகள்), கர்நாடக முதல்வர் சித்தராமையா தனது ராஜினாமா கடிதத்தை ஆளுநர் தாவர் சந்த் கெலாட்டிடம் மே 28 அன்று அளித்தார். துணை முதல்வர் டி. சிவகுமார் புதிய முதல்வராகப் பொறுப்பேற்க உள்ளார்; அவர் மே 31 அன்று பதவியேற்கிறார். 2023 முதல் 2026 வரை இரண்டாவது முறையாக பதவி வகித்த சித்தராமையா, கர்நாடகாவில் அதிகபட்சமாக 8 ஆண்டுகள் முதல்வராக இருந்த சாதனையைப் படைத்துள்ளார். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Article: Article 164 states that the Chief Minister shall be appointed by the Governor.

chunks.text: The National Testing Agency (NTA) announced the revised dates for the Common University Entrance Test (CUET UG 2026) for admission to undergraduate courses in central universities. The exams, previously postponed due to the Bakrid festival, will now be held on May 31, June 6, and June 7. Admit cards for the May 31 exam have been released on the official website. மத்திய பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் இளநிலை பட்டப்படிப்புகளில் சேருவதற்கான பொது பல்கலைக்கழக நுழைவுத் தேர்வுக்கான (CUET UG 2026) திருத்தப்பட்ட தேதிகளை தேசிய தேர்வு முகமை (NTA) அறிவித்தது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Kazakhstan Signs $16.5 Billion Deal with Russia for First Nuclear Power Plant
chunks.text: Kazakhstan, Central Asia's largest country, signed a landmark $16. 5 billion agreement with Russia to build its first-ever nuclear power plant. Russian President Vladimir Putin and Kazakh President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev signed the pact in Astana. Russia's state nuclear corporation, Rosatom, secured the contract, beating competitors from China, France, and South Korea. The plant will be built at Ulken village on the shores of Lake Balkhash, with operations expected to begin in 2034.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Kazakhstan Signs $16.5 Billion Deal with Russia for First Nuclear Power Plant
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Static GK Hook: Kazakhstan is the world's largest producer of Uranium. Despite this, it hasn't had a nuclear power plant, partly due to the tragic legacy of Soviet-era nuclear testing at Semipalatinsk. GEM Geography Exam Angle: "Lake Balkhash" is located in Kazakhstan. It is unique because its western half is fresh water, while the eastern half is saline. Global Ethics · Religion CRITICAL

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Pope Francis Officially Rejects the 'Just War' Theory
chunks.text: In a historic doctrinal shift, Pope Francis has officially rejected the "Just War" theory that the Catholic Church has followed since the 5th century. In his new encyclical 'Mecnico Humanitas' (Great Humanity), the Pope stated that the theory is often misused as an excuse to justify military conflicts and warfare instead of seeking peace. The original theory was formulated by St. Augustine around 430 AD. 5-ஆம் நூற்றாண்டு முதல் கத்தோலிக்க திருச்சபை பின்பற்றி வரும் "நியாயமான போர்" (Just War) கோட்பாட்டை போப் பிரான்சிஸ் அதிகாரப்பூர்வமாக நிராகரித்து

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Pope Francis Officially Rejects the 'Just War' Theory
chunks.text: தனது புதிய சுற்றறிக்கையான 'மெக்னிகோ ஹுமனிடாஸ்' (Mecnico Humanitas) மூலம், அமைதியைத் தேடுவதற்குப் பதிலாக ராணுவ மோதல்கள் மற்றும் போர்களை நியாயப்படுத்த இக்கோட்பாடு ஒரு சாக்காக தவறாகப் பயன்படுத்தப்படுவதாக அவர் சுட்டிக்காட்டினார். அசல் கோட்பாடு கி. 430-ல் புனித அகஸ்டின் என்பவரால் உருவாக்கப்பட்டது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Historical Context: The "Just War" theory (Jus ad bellum) outlines conditions under which resorting to war is morally justifiable (e. , self-defense, last resort).

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: ONGC Q4 Profit Rises 3%; BSNL Revenue Crosses ₹25,000 Crore
chunks.text: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) reported a 3% rise in its Q4 (Jan-Mar 2026) net profit to ₹6,649. However, its overall annual profit for 2025-26 dropped by 7. 6% due to higher costs in finding new reserves. Meanwhile, Minister of State for Communications Pemmasani Chandrasekhar announced that BSNL's revenue reached ₹25,000 crore for FY 2025-26, marking a significant 19% growth over the past two years due to infrastructure upgrades and 4G rollouts.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Norway Chess: Praggnanandhaa Defeats Magnus Carlsen Again
chunks.text: Indian grandmaster R. Praggnanandhaa secured a major victory by defeating World No. 1 Magnus Carlsen in the third round of the Norway Chess tournament. Playing with white pieces in the classical format, Praggnanandhaa forced Carlsen to resign after 46 moves. This marks his second classical win against Carlsen and his 9th victory overall across all formats against the Norwegian champion. நார்வே செஸ் போட்டியின் 3-வது சுற்றில் உலகின் நம்பர் 1 வீரரான மேக்னஸ் கார்ல்சனை வீழ்த்தி இந்திய கிராண்ட்மாஸ்டர் ஆர்.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Norway Chess: Praggnanandhaa Defeats Magnus Carlsen Again
chunks.text: பிரக்ஞானந்தா முக்கிய வெற்றியைப் பதிவு செய்தார். கிளாசிக்கல் பிரிவில் வெள்ளை நிற காய்களுடன் விளையாடிய பிரக்ஞானந்தா, 46 நகர்வுகளுக்குப் பிறகு கார்ல்சனை சரணடையச் செய்தார். கார்ல்சனுக்கு எதிராக கிளாசிக்கல் செஸ்ஸில் இவர் பெறும் 2-வது வெற்றி இதுவாகும். அனைத்து வடிவங்களிலும் சேர்த்து 9-வது வெற்றியாகும். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment TIP Sports achievements by Indians (especially Tamil Nadu athletes like Praggnanandhaa) against World Champions are frequently asked in TNPSC exams.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: 4 Indian Women Umpires in 2026 Women's T20 World Cup Panel
chunks.text: The International Cricket Council (ICC) announced an 18-member all-female umpiring panel for the upcoming Women's T20 World Cup to be held in England and Wales. Four Indian umpires have been included: Match Referee G. Lakshmi, and on-field umpires Gayatri Venugopalan, Vrinda Rathi, and Janani N. This is the third consecutive time the Women's T20 World Cup will feature an all-female umpiring panel. இங்கிலாந்து மற்றும் வேல்ஸில் நடைபெறவுள்ள மகளிர் டி20 உலகக் கோப்பைக்கான 18 பேர் கொண்ட அனைத்து மகளிர் நடுவர் குழுவை சர்வதேச கிரிக்கெட் கவுன்சில் (ICC)

chunks.text: View Answer & Explanation Correct Answer: Tenth Schedule (10th Schedule) Context: Four AIADMK MLAs resigned their posts before extending support to the newly elected majority party, TVK, to avoid disqualification under this schedule. பின்னணி: இந்த அட்டவணையின் கீழ் தகுதி நீக்கம் செய்யப்படுவதைத் தவிர்ப்பதற்காக, புதிதாக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்ட தவெக கட்சிக்கு ஆதரவு அளிப்பதற்கு முன்பு நான்கு அதிமுக எம்எல்ஏக்கள் தங்கள் பதவிகளை ராஜினாமா செய்தனர்.

chunks.section: Q: Lake Balkhash, chosen as the site for the country's first nuclear power plant, is located in which of the following n
chunks.text: View Answer & Explanation Correct Answer: Kazakhstan Context: Kazakhstan signed a $16. 5 billion agreement with Russia's Rosatom to build its first nuclear power plant at Ulken village on the shores of Lake Balkhash. பின்னணி: பால்காஷ் ஏரியின் கரையில் உள்ள உல்கென் கிராமத்தில் தனது முதல் அணுமின் நிலையத்தை கட்ட ரஷ்யாவின் ரோசாடோம் நிறுவனத்துடன் 16. 5 பில்லியன் டாலர் ஒப்பந்தத்தில் கஜகஸ்தான் கையெழுத்திட்டது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal Selected as New TN DGP
chunks.text: The Tamil Nadu government has decided to appoint senior IPS officer Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal as the new Director General of Police (DGP) and Head of Police Force (HoPF). He is currently serving as Special DGP, Human Rights Division in the Border Security Force (BSF), holding additional charge of the Kolkata sector. The UPSC had recently sent a panel of three eligible officers (Rajeev Kumar, Sandeep Rathore, and Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal) to the TN Govt.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal Selected as New TN DGP
chunks.text: He will officially take charge next week, replacing current DGP Sandeep Rathore. தமிழக சட்டம் ஒழுங்கு காவல்துறை தலைமை இயக்குநராக (DGP) மற்றும் மாநில காவல் படைத் தலைவராக (HoPF) மூத்த ஐபிஎஸ் அதிகாரி மகேஷ் குமார் அகர்வாலை நியமிக்க தமிழக அரசு முடிவு செய்துள்ளது. அவர் தற்போது எல்லைப் பாதுகாப்புப் படையில் (BSF) மனித உரிமைகள் பிரிவு சிறப்பு டிஜிபியாக பணியாற்றி வருகிறார். யுபிஎஸ்சி (UPSC) சமீபத்தில் தகுதியான மூன்று அதிகாரிகளின் (ராஜீவ் குமார், சந்தீப் ரத்தோர், மகேஷ் குமார் அகர்வால்) பட்டியலை தமிழக அரசுக்கு அனுப்பியது.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal Selected as New TN DGP
chunks.text: தற்போதைய டிஜிபி சந்தீப் ரத்தோருக்குப் பதிலாக அவர் அடுத்த வாரம் அதிகாரப்பூர்வமாக பொறுப்பேற்பார். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Background: Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal belongs to the 1994 IPS batch (TN cadre). According to Supreme Court guidelines (Prakash Singh Case), the DGP appointed must have a minimum of 6 months residual service. He is scheduled to retire on March 31, 2032. PYQ Questions frequently ask for the current heads of important state departments and commissions.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Madras HC Directs TN Govt on Depositing Temple Funds in Tangedco
chunks.text: The Tamil Nadu government has assured the Madras High Court that the surplus funds of HR&CE temples deposited in the Tamil Nadu Power Finance and Infrastructure Development Corporation are secure, and the government takes full responsibility for them. A PIL was filed challenging a recent G. that amended HR&CE investment rules to allow depositing approximately ₹2,700 crore of surplus temple funds into non-banking financial entities of the state government.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Madras HC Directs TN Govt on Depositing Temple Funds in Tangedco
chunks.text: ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Constitutional Hook: Articles 25 and 26 deal with the freedom of religion and the right to manage religious affairs and own/acquire movable and immovable property. TRAP HR&CE (Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments) Act, 1959 is a state act. The administration of temples falls under the Concurrent List (Entry 28 - Charities and charitable institutions, charitable and religious endowments). Governance · VIP Darshan MODERATE

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Madras HC on VIP Darshan: "God Doesn't Wait for VIPs"
chunks.text: The Madras High Court observed that God does not need to wait for MLAs or Ministers. The bench, hearing a case regarding a Minister allegedly forcing a temple in Thiruparankundram to remain open beyond its scheduled closing time for his darshan, stated that it does not want to embarrass anyone but emphasized that the deity cannot be kept waiting for VIPs. எம்எல்ஏக்கள், அமைச்சர்களுக்காக கடவுள் காத்திருக்க வேண்டியதில்லை என சென்னை உயர்நீதிமன்றம் கருத்து தெரிவித்துள்ளது.

chunks.section: SC Directs High Courts to Deliver Judgments Within 3 Months of Reserving
chunks.text: In a major judicial reform order, the Supreme Court has set a strict timeline for High Courts across the country, mandating that judgments must be delivered within three months after the conclusion of hearings and reserving of the verdict. If a judgment is not delivered within 4 months, parties can apply to the HC Chief Justice to withdraw the case and assign it to a new bench for fresh hearing. வழக்கு விசாரணைகள் முடிவடைந்து தீர்ப்பு ஒத்திவைக்கப்பட்டால், மூன்று மாதங்களுக்குள் உயர்நீதிமன்றங்கள் தீர்ப்பளிக்க வேண்டும் என்று உச்சநீதிமன்றம் கண்டிப்ப

chunks.section: SC Directs High Courts to Deliver Judgments Within 3 Months of Reserving
chunks.text: 4 மாதங்களுக்குள் தீர்ப்பு வழங்கப்படாவிட்டால், வழக்கை திரும்பப் பெற்று புதிய அமர்வின் விசாரணைக்கு மாற்றுமாறு சம்பந்தப்பட்ட தரப்பினர் உயர்நீதிமன்ற தலைமை நீதிபதியிடம் விண்ணப்பிக்கலாம். ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Polity Hook: Article 141 of the Constitution states that the law declared by the Supreme Court shall be binding on all courts within the territory of India. The right to a speedy trial is a fundamental right implicit in the guarantee of life and personal liberty under Article 21.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: NEET UG Paper Leak: SC Demands Strict Accountability from NTA
chunks.text: Hearing petitions regarding the cancellation of the NEET UG 2026 exam due to paper leaks, the Supreme Court strongly reprimanded the National Testing Agency (NTA). The SC stated that until accountability is fixed, the core issue will not be resolved, and the youth should not be subjected to "fraud". The court suggested the NTA should learn from the UPSC, which conducts exams flawlessly. The cancelled exam has been rescheduled to be conducted again on June 21.

chunks.text: ரத்து செய்யப்பட்ட தேர்வு ஜூன் 21-ம் தேதி மீண்டும் நடைபெற உள்ளது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Fact: The National Testing Agency (NTA) is an autonomous agency established by the Ministry of Education (MoE) in 2017 to conduct entrance examinations for higher educational institutions. chunks.section: Kerala Govt Announces 3 Days Menstrual Leave for School Girls
chunks.text: In its policy address presented by Governor Arif Mohammed Khan, the newly formed Congress-led UDF government in Kerala announced a progressive scheme named 'Maathavidaai Kanniyam' (Menstrual Dignity). Under this scheme, school girls will be granted up to 3 days of menstrual leave every month. chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Israel and Russian Forces Added to UN's "Blacklist" for Violating Children's Rights
chunks.text: For the first time, Israel and Russian forces have been added to the United Nations' annual "blacklist" of countries and groups that commit grave violations against children in armed conflicts. A leaked UN report documented severe abuses, including sexual violence and torture, against Palestinian minors in Gaza/West Bank by Israeli forces, and against Ukrainian children by Russian forces. Hamas remains on the list since the October 7 attacks. ஆயுத மோதல்களில் குழந்தைகளுக்கு எதிராக கடுமையான வன்முறைகளில் ஈடுபடும் நாடுகள் மற்றும் குழுக்களின் ஐ.

chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Elephants Recorded at Record 3,000m Altitude in Arunachal Pradesh
chunks.text: A joint study conducted by WWF-India and the Arunachal Pradesh Forest Department has recorded the presence of elephants at an unprecedented altitude of over 3,000 meters above sea level. This is reported to be the highest recorded elevation globally for elephant habitats. The study, conducted between December 2024 and March 2026, aims to understand elephant movements and mitigate human-elephant conflicts. உலகளாவிய இயற்கை நிதியம் (WWF-India) மற்றும் அருணாச்சலப் பிரதேச வனத்துறை இணைந்து நடத்திய ஆய்வில், கடல் மட்டத்திலிருந்து 3,000 மீட்டருக்கும் அத

chunks.text: உலகளவில் யானைகள் வாழும் மிக உயரமான இடமாக இது பதிவாகியுள்ளது. யானைகளின் நடமாட்டத்தைப் புரிந்து கொள்ளவும், மனித-யானை மோதல்களைக் குறைக்கவும் டிசம்பர் 2024 முதல் மார்ச் 2026 வரை இந்த ஆய்வு நடத்தப்பட்டது. ▸ TNPSC Enrichment Ecology Angle: Elephants are typically found in lower elevations (tropical and subtropical forests). chunks.title: Current Affairs Artifact
chunks.section: Supreme Court Allows Vinesh Phogat in Asian Games Selection Trials
chunks.text: The Supreme Court intervened to allow prominent Indian wrestler Vinesh Phogat to participate in the selection trials for the 2026 Asian Games. The Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) had earlier introduced a controversial rule stating that only medal winners from domestic tournaments in 2025/2026 were eligible for trials, effectively barring Phogat who had been protesting against the former WFI chief over sexual harassment allegations. 2026 ஆசிய விளையாட்டுப் போட்டிகளுக்கான தகுதித் தேர்வுகளில் (Selection trials) முன்னணி இந்திய மல்யுத்த வீராங்கனை

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: நிதிக்குழு | Financial Commission | Article 280 | Constitutional Body 280 Article No. 1951 First FC Year 16 Total FCs (2026) 41% 16th FC Devolution 5 yrs Each FC Term CRITICAL Must-know facts TRAP Common mistakes TIP Memory tricks PYQ Previous Year Qs GEM Live class insights

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.section: 1. Introduction — What is the Finance Commission?
chunks.text: The Finance Commission (நிதி ஆணயம் / நிதிக்குழு) is a Constitutional body established for the entire country of India. It is set up once every five years by the President of India (குடியரசு தலைவர்) under Article 280 of the Indian Constitution. It was first established in 1951 — after the Constitution came into force on 26 January 1950. Since 1951, a new Finance Commission has been constituted every five years. As of May 2026, a total of 16 Finance Commissions have been set up, and the 16th Finance Commission is currently in operation.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.section: 1. Introduction — What is the Finance Commission?
chunks.text: CRITICAL The Finance Commission is a Constitutional Body — it is explicitly provided for in the Constitution under Article 280. This distinguishes it from NITI Aayog (earlier Planning Commission), which has NO constitutional basis. NITI Aayog is a non-constitutional body . TRAP Students often confuse Finance Commission (நிதி ஆணயம்) with NITI Aayog (நிதி ஆயோக்). Remember: Finance Commission = Constitutional (Article 280). NITI Aayog = Non-Constitutional (no article in Constitution).

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Central Government collects a large number of taxes (income tax, customs duty, surcharges, etc. From the revenue collected through certain specified taxes , a share must be distributed to the State Governments. The Finance Commission determines what percentage of that collected revenue should be shared with the states, and how it should be distributed among them. TIP Think of it simply: Central Govt earns money → Finance Commission decides how much % to give to states → States receive funds.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Article 280 The President shall, within two years from the commencement of this Constitution and thereafter at the expiration of every fifth year or at such earlier time as the President considers necessary, by order constitute a Finance Commission which shall consist of a Chairman and four other members. CRITICAL Article 280 — This is the ONLY article you need for Finance Commission. It authorises the President to constitute a Finance Commission every 5 years.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Constitution came into force on 26 January 1950 , and the first FC was constituted in 1951 . 280 Article 1951 First FC 16 Total FCs (2026) 5 Years / FC

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: This topic falls under Unit 5 of GS — Economics and Tamil Nadu Administration. Unit 5 is one of the most important units in GS (out of 6 units), yielding a large number of questions.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.section: 3. Composition — Structure of the Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Finance Commission consists of: Position Count Appointed By Chairman (தலைவர்) 1 President of India Members (உறுப்பினர்கள்) 4 President of India Total 5 — CRITICAL The entire power of the Finance Commission — appointment, administration, all decisions — rests with the President of India (குடியரசு தலைவர்) . All members are appointed by the President and take oath administered by the President.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Chairman must have qualifications required to be appointed as a Judge of the Supreme Court of India, PLUS experience in finance-related matters: # Qualification Criteria 1 Qualifications required to be a Supreme Court Judge (உச்ச நீதிமன்றத்துடைய நீதிபதி தகுதி) 2 Experience in government administration and accounts (அரசு நிர்வாக கணக்கு அனுபவம்) 3 Financial management experience (நிதி நிர்வாக அனுபவம்) 4 Specialised knowledge in finance sector (நிதித்துறை சிறப்பு அறிவு)

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The term is 5 years (or as long as the President desires). The President may extend this if needed. Members can be re-appointed — they are eligible for reappointment to the Finance Commission.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: CRITICAL Chairman: Arvind Panagariya (அரவிந்த் பனாகரியா) Role Name Chairman Arvind Panagariya Member Smt. Annie George Matthew (திருமதி அன்னி ஜார்ஜ் மேத்தியூ) Member Dr. Manoj Pande (டாக்டர் மனோஜ் பாண்டே) Member Shri Ravishankar (திரு ரவிசங்கர்) Member Dr. Soumya Kanti Ghosh (டாக்டர் சுமி காந்தி கோஷ்)

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Chairman prepares the report after conducting studies and submits it to the President of India . The President then tables it before Parliament . The 16th FC submitted its report on 17 November 2025 to President Droupadi Murmu. It was tabled in Parliament on 1 February 2026 along with the Union Budget.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Finance Commission recommends: Function 1 Tax Revenue Sharing (வரி வருவாய் பகிர்வு) — What percentage of Central tax revenue should be distributed to states (Vertical Devolution) Function 2 Distribution Among States (மாநிலங்களுக்கிடையே பகிர்வு) — How to distribute the states' share among all 28 states (Horizontal Devolution) Function 3 Grants & Loans (மானியங்கள் மற்றும் கடன்கள்) — Recommendations for grants-in-aid and loans to state governments Function 4 Centre-State Financial Relations Study (மத்திய-மாநில நிதி ஒப்பந்தங்கள் ஆய்வு) — Study

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Central Government ↓ ↓ 41% All State Governments Central Govt collects taxes → what % goes down to ALL states combined. Called "Vertical" because Centre is above States (hierarchical = vertical direction).

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: TN KL UP 28 states The 41% is split across all 28 states based on various criteria. Called "Horizontal" because all states are equal — the distribution is sideways/horizontal. CRITICAL The 16th Finance Commission recommended 41% of the Central divisible pool be devolved to states. States had demanded 50% , but the FC maintained the same 41% as the 15th FC.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Not ALL central tax revenue is shared. Only revenue from specific taxes forms the Divisible Pool . The formula is: Divisible Pool = Gross Tax Revenue MINUS Cess + Surcharge + Cost of Collection For example, your ₹100 petrol purchase has an "extra tax" (cess/surcharge) embedded in it — that portion goes directly to the Centre and is NOT shared. Only the remaining "divisible" portion forms the pool from which 41% is given to states. TRAP The 41% is NOT of the total central tax revenue.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: It is 41% of the Divisible Pool (gross tax revenue minus cess, surcharge, and collection costs). Many students incorrectly think it's the full revenue.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The 41% Divisible Pool is further split among all 28 states based on the following criteria. The total adds up to 100% of the states' share: Income Distance / Revenue Gap (வருமான இடைவெளி) 42. 5% States with lower income get a larger share. Rich states get less. Population (மக்கள் தொகை) 17. 5% States with larger populations (e. , UP, Bihar) receive more funds. Demographic Performance (ஜனசொல்பர்ஃபார்மன்ஸ்) 10% Rewards states for demographic achievements (e.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: , fertility rate control). Area / Geography (பரப்பளவு) 10% Larger states (by geographic area) receive proportionally more. Forest & Ecology (வனம் மற்றும் சுற்றுச்சூழல்) 10% States with more forest cover and better ecological indicators are rewarded. GDP Contribution (ஜிடிபி பங்களிப்பு) 10% Based on the state's contribution to national GDP. TIP Mnemonic for 16th FC Criteria: " I ncome P eople D emo A rea F orest G DP" → IPDAFG (42. 5 + 10 + 10 + 10 + 10 = 100%)

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: TRAP Year of Constitution ≠ Year of Operation. Each FC is set up ~2 years BEFORE its operational period begins. The exam can ask EITHER the year of formation OR the 5-year operational period. Don't confuse them!

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Example: 15th FC was constituted in 2017 . After 2 years of study, it submitted its report in December 2019 . Its recommendations were operational from 2020–21 to 2025–26 (5 years). The 16th FC was then constituted in 2023 (2 years before 15th's term ended) and its recommendations are operational from 2026–27 to 2030–31 . # Year Constituted Chairman Operational Period Notable Points 1st 1951 K. Neogy (கேசி நியோகி) 1952–1957 First ever FC of independent India 2nd 1956 K.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: சந்தானம்) 1957–1962 — 3rd 1960 A. Chanda 1962–1966 — 4th 1964 P. Rajamannar 1966–1969 — 5th 1968 Mahavir Tyagi 1969–1974 — 6th 1972 Brahmananad Reddy 1974–1979 — 7th 1977 J. Shelat 1979–1984 — 8th 1983 Y. Chavan 1984–1989 — 9th 1987 N. Salve 1989–1995 — 10th 1992 K. Pant 1995–2000 — 11th 1998 A. Khusro 2000–2005 — 12th 2003 C. Rangarajan 2005–2010 Lecture specifically mentioned 13th 2007 Vijay Kelkar 2010–2015 — 14th 2013 Y. Reddy 2015–2020 Devolved 42% to states 15th 2017 N.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Singh (என் கே சிங்) 2020–2026 41% devolution; report submitted Dec 2019; lecturer specifically cited 16th ★ 2023 Arvind Panagariya 2026–2031 CURRENT; report submitted Nov 17, 2025; 41% devolution TIP For the 12th FC (2003) : Constituted 2003 → Report ~2004 → Operational 2005–2010. This pattern was specifically used in the lecture as an illustration.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Parameter Detail Constituted 2023 Chairman Arvind Panagariya (அரவிந்த் பனாகரியா) Report Submitted To President 17 November 2025 Submitted to President Droupadi Murmu (திரௌபதி முர்மு) Tabled in Parliament 1 February 2026 (with Union Budget) Tabled by Nirmala Sitharaman (Finance Minister) Operational Period 2026–27 to 2030–31 (April 1, 2026 → March 31, 2031) Vertical Devolution 41% of Divisible Pool to States States Demanded 50% (all 28 states collectively) Core Vision Cooperative Fiscal Federalism (இணக்கம் சார்ந்த நிதி கூட்டாட்சி)

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: CRITICAL 41% devolution from divisible pool to states — same as 15th FC. Recommendation Amount / Target Rural Local Bodies (கிராமப்புற உள்ளாட்சி) ₹4. 4 lakh crore (கிட்டத்தட்ட) Urban Local Bodies (நகர்ப்புற உள்ளாட்சி) ₹3. 6 lakh crore (கிட்டத்தட்ட) Disaster Management (பேரிடர் மேலாண்மை) ₹1,55,916 crore (கிட்டத்தட்ட) Fiscal Deficit Target — Centre 3. 5% of GDP Fiscal Deficit Target — States 3% of GDP Debt Target 77.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The 16th FC's stated vision: "Cooperative Fiscal Federalism" — the idea that Central and State governments must work together harmoniously. It emphasised: Efficiency, Transparency, and Financial Discipline Fiscal health is the foundation of sustainable growth and intergenerational equity

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: A key debate surrounding recent Finance Commissions is whether southern states (which have better governance metrics) receive their "fair" share. Here's a comparison between the 15th and 16th FC allocations: State 15th FC Share % 16th FC Share % Change Tamil Nadu (தமிழ்நாடு) 4. 097% ▲ Slight increase Kerala (கேரளா) 1. 382% ▲ Significant increase Karnataka (கர்நாடகா) 3. 131% ▲ Increase Andhra Pradesh (ஆந்திரா) Data provided in lecture (check source) — Telangana (தெலுங்கானா) Data provided in lecture (check source) — GEM All Southern States collec

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: This is significant because southern states had long argued that their better population control and higher development metrics were penalising them (fewer people = less money under population criteria).

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Type Definition Repayment? Grant (மானியம்) Money given by Centre to States for specific purposes No — Non-repayable Loan (கடன்) Money lent by Centre to States Yes — Must be repaid CRITICAL Revenue Deficit Grants (ரெவென்யூ டிபிக்ட் கிராண்ட்ஸ்) — Grants given to states that have a revenue deficit (where expenditure > revenue). These are non-repayable transfers from Centre to States. Fiscal Deficit (நிதி பற்றாக்குறை) explained simply: If you earn ₹10,000 but spend ₹15,000, your deficit is ₹5,000 = 50% of income.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The FC sets a target: Centre should not exceed 3. 5% fiscal deficit-to-GDP; States should not exceed 3%.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Category Amount Rural Local Bodies ~₹4. 4 lakh crore Urban Local Bodies ~₹3. 6 lakh crore Disaster Management ₹1,55,916 crore

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: PYQ Under which Article of the Indian Constitution is the Finance Commission established? ✓ Answer Article 280 — The Finance Commission is established under Article 280 of the Indian Constitution. It mandates the President to constitute a Finance Commission every 5 years. PYQ How often is the Finance Commission constituted, and by whom? ✓ Answer The Finance Commission is constituted every 5 years by the President of India under Article 280 of the Constitution.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: PYQ How many Finance Commissions have been constituted in India so far (as of 2026)? ✓ Answer 16 Finance Commissions have been constituted from 1951 to 2026. The 16th Finance Commission (2026–2031) is currently in operation. PYQ Who is the Chairman of the 16th Finance Commission? ✓ Answer Arvind Panagariya (அரவிந்த் பனாகரியா) is the Chairman of the 16th Finance Commission. PYQ What is the operational period of the 16th Finance Commission? ✓ Answer The 16th Finance Commission's recommendations are operational from April 1, 2026 to March 31, 2031

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: , financial years 2026–27 to 2030–31). The FC was constituted in 2023 and submitted its report on November 17, 2025. PYQ What percentage of the divisible pool has the 16th Finance Commission recommended for devolution to states? ✓ Answer 41% of the divisible pool (Central tax revenue minus cess, surcharge, and collection costs) to be devolved to all states. This is the same as the 15th FC. States had demanded 50% but were given 41%. PYQ What is Vertical Devolution (செங்குத்து பகிர்வு)?

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: ✓ Answer Vertical Devolution refers to the distribution of Central tax revenues downward from the Central Government to the States as a whole . Since Centre is hierarchically above States, this top-to-bottom distribution is called "vertical. " The 16th FC recommended 41% vertical devolution. PYQ What is Horizontal Devolution (கிடைமட்ட பகிர்வு)? ✓ Answer Horizontal Devolution refers to the distribution of the states' share (the 41%) among all 28 states based on various criteria (income gap, population, area, forests, GDP, demographic performance

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: Since all states are equal in status, the sharing is "horizontal. " The criteria weightages add up to 100%. PYQ What is the Divisible Pool (பிரிக்கக்கூடிய நிதி தொகுப்பு)? ✓ Answer The Divisible Pool is the pool of Central tax revenue from which states' share is distributed. It equals Gross Tax Revenue MINUS (Cess + Surcharge + Cost of Collection) . Not all Central taxes are shared — only the divisible pool is distributed between Centre and States.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: PYQ Is the Finance Commission a Constitutional body? Is NITI Aayog a Constitutional body? ✓ Answer Finance Commission = YES, Constitutional Body — established under Article 280. NITI Aayog = NO, Non-Constitutional Body — there is no specific article in the Constitution for it. NITI Aayog (formerly Planning Commission) is a purely executive/administrative body. PYQ When did the 15th Finance Commission submit its report, and for which period were its recommendations applicable?

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: ✓ Answer The 15th Finance Commission (Chairman: N. Singh) was constituted in 2017 and submitted its report in December 2019 . Its recommendations were applicable for 2020–21 to 2025–26 (5 years, ending March 31, 2026). PYQ When was the first Finance Commission constituted and who was its Chairman? ✓ Answer The first Finance Commission was constituted in 1951 . Its Chairman was K. Neogy (கேசி நியோகி) . Its recommendations were operational from 1952 to 1957.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: PYQ What are the fiscal deficit targets recommended by the 16th Finance Commission? ✓ Answer The 16th Finance Commission recommended: • Central Government : Fiscal deficit not to exceed 3. 5% of GDP • State Governments : Fiscal deficit not to exceed 3% of GDP • Combined Debt: Target of 77. 3% of GDP PYQ The 16th FC report was tabled in Parliament on which date and along with what? ✓ Answer The 16th FC report was tabled in Parliament on 1 February 2026 by Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman , along with the Union Budget 2026–27 .

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: These are key insights from the live classroom discussion — beyond the standard textbook content: 💎 GEM 1 — FC vs NITI Aayog Distinction The teacher specifically called out that many students confuse Finance Commission (Constitutional — Article 280) with NITI Aayog (Non-Constitutional). If asked in an interview or exam whether FC is a Constitutional body, always say YES and cite Article 280. NITI Aayog has NO article in the Constitution. 💎 GEM 2 — The 2-Year Pattern (Critical Pattern!

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: ) A Finance Commission is set up approximately 2 years BEFORE its operational period begins. It spends those 2 years studying, then submits its report. The 5-year "term" people cite is the operational period of recommendations , NOT the period from when the FC was constituted. This distinction is EXAM-CRITICAL and books often don't explain it clearly. 💎 GEM 3 — Petrol Price Analogy for Cess When you pay ₹100 for petrol, you don't see the "cess" embedded in it.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: The Centre collects this hidden extra tax. That cess/surcharge money is NOT shared with states — it stays with the Centre. Only the "divisible pool" (gross tax minus cess/surcharge/collection costs) is shared. This is why states always demand more — they don't get the cess revenue. 💎 GEM 4 — States Demanded 50%, Got 41% All 28 State Governments collectively demanded 50% devolution from the 16th FC. But the FC recommended only 41% — the same as the 15th FC.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: "மாநிலங்களின் பங்கு 15வது குழுவை போலவே மாற்றமின்றி தொடர்கிறது" — the states' share continues unchanged from the 15th FC. This is a hot current affairs point for exams. 💎 GEM 5 — Why "Vertical" and "Horizontal"? The teacher explained this visually: Centre is "above" States in India's power hierarchy → Centre-to-States distribution = top-to-bottom = VERTICAL. All 28 states are "equal" to each other → distribution among them = side-to-side = HORIZONTAL.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: This is why these simple geometric terms are used for fiscal devolution. 💎 GEM 6 — "Year of Constitution" vs "Year of Operation" Trap The teacher warned: "Books often don't clarify this clearly. " Exam questions may ask EITHER when the FC was constituted OR when its recommendations were operational. These are TWO DIFFERENT years. Example: 12th FC constituted 2003, operational 2005–2010. Always know BOTH dates for each FC. 💎 GEM 7 — Income Tax is a Central Subject The teacher reminded students: Income Tax is collected by the Central Government

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: "இன்கம் டாக்ஸ்ங்கற டிபார்ட்மெண்ட் வந்து மத்திய அரசோடது. " This is why the Central revenue sharing formula matters — Income Tax revenue goes to Centre first, then is partly shared with states through the divisible pool mechanism. 💎 GEM 8 — Future 17th FC Timing Prediction Based on the pattern: The 16th FC is operational until March 31, 2031. Therefore, the 17th Finance Commission will likely be constituted around 2029 — two years before the 16th FC's term ends.

chunks.title: Finance Commission
chunks.text: This is how you can predict future FC timelines! 💎 GEM 9 — 16th FC Report Tabled WITH Budget The 16th FC report was tabled in Parliament on February 1, 2026 — the same day as the Union Budget. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presented both together. "பட்ஜெட்டோட சேர்த்தே ரிலீஸ் பண்ணாங்க" — This is a contemporary facts point likely to appear in current affairs-based questions. 💎 GEM 10 — Re-eligibility of FC Members The teacher specifically mentioned that members of a Finance Commission ARE eligible for reappointment.
